metadata.description: Production-grade standards for Claude Code — Flutter, API (NestJS + Prisma), Web (Next.js). Install a pack, Claude applies the standards. No CLAUDE.md edits.

plugins.name: flutter-standards
plugins.description: Flutter pack — 9 auto-invoke standards (craft, engineering, widgets, data, testing, a11y, perf, forms, observability), 8 audit/scaffold skills invoked via slash commands, 3 review agents.

plugins.name: api-standards
plugins.description: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. 2 auto-invoke standards (nestjs, code-quality), sync-migrate workflow, api-documenter + security-reviewer agents.

plugins.name: web-standards
plugins.description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke nextjs standards, pre-ship + premium-check audit skills.

plugins.name: core-hooks
plugins.description: Cross-stack safety — PreToolUse hooks that block edits to secrets (.env, keys, credentials) and dangerous shell commands.
